crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: Reduction in US tariff amid steady domestic demand will help Indian diamond polishers log a 6-7% on-year growth in revenue in fiscal 2027 to $15.0-15.5 billion.

crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: Shrimp exports to cross Rs 50,000 crore this fiscal, volume to improve
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: India’s shrimp exports are set to exceed Rs 50,000 crore this fiscal—up 13-15% on-year after three years of stagnation—shaking off steep United States (US) tariffs by deftly engaging with, and shipping to, other markets.

crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: 16th Finance Commission proposals long-term positive for states
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: The 16th Finance Commission’s (FC) emphasis to reduce mounting revenue deficits and undertake growth-oriented capital outlays augurs well for states’ fiscal health in the long term. In the near term, however, constraints persist with limited incremental fiscal support for states.

crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: Profitability of gold-loan NBFCs to remain healthy at ~4.25-4.5% this and next fiscal
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: Non-banking financial companies (NBFCs)  specialising in gold loans are expected to see their already healthy profitability rising in the medium term with average return on managed assets (RoMA) estimated in the range of ~4.25-4.5% through this and next fiscal (refer to chart in annexure).

icici-bank-research.title: Food inflation inches higher, while core steady

ssga-insights.title: Trimming risk, staying constructive

ssga-insights.title: The retirement proving ground
ssga-insights.description: The “4% rule” has long been the go-to approach for drawing down income in retirement. But can one “rule” really apply to everyone? We look at some hypothetical examples to test out retirement income strategies.

ssga-insights.description: Oil has risen as expected, but disruption is spreading from Hormuz transport bottlenecks to energy production, deepening risk-off sentiment.

ssga-insights.description: Renewed US labor market weakness, cautious central banks, and geopolitical risks shape this week’s outlook, with AI disruption and energy prices in sharp focus.

ssga-insights.description: China’s equity performance continues to diverge from emerging markets as policy uncertainty and structural challenges weigh on returns.

ssga-insights.description: SAFI celebrates 2 years of disciplined, factor-driven fixed income investing with strong, consistent performance and robust risk management for clients.

ssga-insights.title: Markets send the signals—ETF flows show where investors are headed
ssga-insights.description: In a market flooded with signs, ETF flows reveal how investors are interpreting signals and positioning portfolios amid uncertainty.

ssga-insights.description: US cash markets remain stable as the Fed signals patience, liquidity stays ample, and front-end volatility reflects headlines more than policy shifts.

ssga-insights.title: Private markets: Addressing liquidity concerns
ssga-insights.description: Dan Farley details how we address meeting liquidity needs when introducing private markets to target date funds.

ssga-insights.title: The power of information ratio (IR) in active management

ssga-insights.title: Are yields entering a new phase?
ssga-insights.description: Long-dated sovereign yields test historic thresholds, raising questions about regime shifts across Gilts, JGBs, and Treasuries.

ssga-insights.title: US industry shows signs of revival
ssga-insights.description: A gradual revival in US industry, resilient Canadian demand, and persistent Australian inflation define this week’s global macroeconomic outlook.

ssga-insights.title: Capturing opportunity as the equity landscape evolves
ssga-insights.description: AI stocks may dominate, but market dispersion is broadening, offering potential reward for active investors who look beyond headline trends for opportunities.

ssga-insights.title: The All Weather portfolio: Built for any forecast

ssga-insights.title: How should I add thematic investments to portfolios?
ssga-insights.description: Navigate today's dynamic market and help your clients achieve their goals with From the Field, a monthly series where our strategists answer timely questions from advisors like you.

ssga-insights.title: The value of dividend growth strategies to portfolios today and beyond
ssga-insights.description: In times of uncertainty, pivoting away from concentration and leveraging the stability of a dividend growth strategy with SDY can potentially help investors reduce the impact of volatility.

ssga-insights.title: How economic factors impact asset performance
ssga-insights.description: Learn how economic forces uniquely impact different asset classes. Uncover why macroeconomic-environmental diversification, not just asset class diversification, may help build wealth over the long-term.

ssga-insights.description: Learn how ALLW applies Bridgewater’s All Weather approach with the goal of compounding capital through various types of economic weather.

ssga-insights.title: India IT adapts to the AI shift
ssga-insights.description: India’s IT sector adapts to the AI shift as margins compress, delivery models evolve, and firms reset for sustainable growth.

ssga-insights.title: Supreme Court IEEPA tariff decision could raise market risk
ssga-insights.description: The Supreme Court’s IEEPA ruling curbs emergency tariffs, but policy risk hasn’t fallen—it has shifted, concentrating market uncertainty at sector and company levels.

ssga-insights.description: This exclusive report explores the money habits of 3,000 retail investors—and can help you uncover some fresh perspectives on your own financial mindset.
